notes: Full mini-game in one HTML file, no libraries. Canvas lawn (5x9 checker grid) + HTML/CSS overlay UI. Sun economy: sky drops + Sunflower production, click to collect (fly-to-counter). Seed bar with 5 plants (Sunflower/Peashooter/Wall-nut/Snow Pea/Cherry Bomb) each with cost + cooldown overlay + select-then-place; dig up by clicking a planted tile. 3 zombies (basic/cone/bucket) with destructible armor + hp bars; peas with collision; Snow Pea applies slow; Cherry Bomb 3x3 AoE + particle burst + screen shake; per-row lawnmowers (last-resort sweep). 10 escalating waves via a wave director, every 3rd = Huge Wave (banner + red tint). Menus: Main / How-to / Leaderboard (localStorage top 5 with name entry) / Pause / Game Over / Victory. Synthesized SFX (Web Audio) muted by default, toggle via 🔊 button or M. Keyboard: 1-5 pick seed, Esc cancel, P pause, M mute.
